name: Posy
description: Six-petaled posies built from orbiting dots around a golden core — bouquets spin and re-bloom on every redraw.

code.style: --bloomSpin: @rand(60deg); --rule: ( /* petals are box-shadow copies of the core at hexagon offsets around one emitted radius, so the bloom opens as a unit */ --pet: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --pr: @r(15, 26); --pw: @r(14, 22); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--pw) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--pw) * 0.5%); top: calc(50% - @var(--pw) * 0.5%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color4); box-shadow: 0 calc(@var(--pr) * -10px / @Y) 0 @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) * 8.66px / @Y) calc(@var(--pr) * -5px / @Y) 0 @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) * 8.66px / @Y) calc(@var(--pr) * 5px / @Y) 0 @var(--pet), 0 calc(@var(--pr) * 10px / @Y) 0 @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) * -8.66px / @Y) calc(@var(--pr) * 5px / @Y) 0 @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) * -8.66px / @Y) calc(@var(--pr) * -5px / @Y) 0 @var(--pet); transform: rotate(var(--bloomSpin)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
